ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_title" TEXT /* Title of the research project */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary description of the project */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of project (e.g., Tools and Maps, Publications) */,
  "lead_lab_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the lead laboratory for the project */,
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the theme associated with the project */,
  "vision_area_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vision area the project falls under */,
  "partner_lab_id" INTEGER /* Reference to partner laboratories involved in the project */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL for accessing detailed project information */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Expected or actual end date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., In Progress, Completed, On Hold) */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "actual_cost" TEXT /* Actual cost incurred for the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project manager responsible for the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the project record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES project_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_theme_id FOREIGN KEY ("theme_id") REFERENCES themes ("theme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_lead_lab_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_lab_id") REFERENCES labs ("lab_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_vision_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("vision_area_id") REFERENCES vision_areas ("vision_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labs" (
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each laboratory */,
  "lab_name" TEXT /* Name of the laboratory */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the laboratory */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the laboratory */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the laboratory */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the laboratory */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the laboratory record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the laboratory record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lab_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "themes" (
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each theme */,
  "theme_name" TEXT /* Name of the theme */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the theme */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the theme record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the theme record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("theme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vision_areas" (
  "vision_area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vision area */,
  "vision_area_name" TEXT /* Name of the vision area */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vision area */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vision area record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the vision area record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vision_area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the project type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project type record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the project type record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_partnerships" (
  "partnership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each partnership */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project involved in the partnership */,
  "partner_lab_id" INTEGER /* ID of the partner laboratory */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the partnership record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the partnership record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("partnership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_partnerships_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_partnerships_partner_lab_id FOREIGN KEY ("partner_lab_id") REFERENCES labs ("lab_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress update */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being updated */,
  "progress_update" TEXT /* Description of the progress update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the progress update */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the progress update record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the progress update record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_progress_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
